svg.title: Architecture diagram
svg.desc: The browser loads the SPA from CloudFront, which serves the static bundle from a private S3 bucket. The browser calls the HTTP API Gateway, which routes to the API Lambda. The API Lambda writes tasks to DynamoDB and enqueues a message on SQS. SQS triggers the Worker Lambda, which sleeps for the requested number of seconds and updates the task status in DynamoDB.
